title: orthocarpus lithospermoides var. typicus
intro: Orthocarpus lithospermoides var. typicus, also known as the typical orthocarpus, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to North America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of using Orthocarpus lithospermoides var. typicus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support immune function. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be dried and used in various herbal preparations, such as infusions and poultices.
